Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**********************************************************************

 The category of enriched functors

 We define the category of enriched functors and prove that it gives
 rise to a univalent category. To do so, we use displayed categories.
 The objects of this category are enriched functors and the morphisms
 are enriched natural transformations.

 In addition, we show that there is an enrichment over the functor
 category if the category over which we enriched is a complete monoidal
 closed category.

 To construct this enrichment, we must encode the type of enriched
 natural transformations as an object in the monoidal category `V`. The
 idea behind this encoding is as follows: first of all, an enriched
 transformation consists of a family of morphisms. We encode this by
 taking a suitable product (we call it `P₁` below). Second of all, an
 enriched transformation satisfies a commutativity condition. We encode
 this by taking a suitable equalizer: this means that we look at those
 families of morphisms such that a certain square commutes. We do so
 by first defining the product `P₂` (note that we take a product over
 pairs of objects in `C₁`). As such, we must construct two morphisms
 from `P₁` to `P₂`. Each of these represents one side of the naturality
 square.

 It is important to note that in the definition of `P₂`, we make use of
 the fact that the monoidal category `V` is closed. The encoded
 condition relates to the usual condition of V-naturality by
 adjointness.

 One might think that one could also use ends (as defined in
 Limits.Ends) to construct the required object. However, this is not
 the case. If one would do so, then only gets natural transformations
 that ar not necessarily enriched. This would thus not give  the right
 morphisms in the category.

 Contents
 1. The category of enriched functors
 2. This category is univalent
 3. Operations on the enriched functor category
 4. The enrichment
 5. Enrichment for enriched presheaf categories

 **********************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.HomFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.OppositeEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.SelfEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.OppositeCategory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Products.

Import MonoidalNotations.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Section EnrichedFunctorCategory.
  Context {V : monoidal_cat}
          {C₁ C₂ : category}
          (E₁ : enrichment C₁ V)
          (E₂ : enrichment C₂ V).

  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
disp_cat_ob_mor [C₁, C₂]

  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
disp_cat_ob_mor [C₁, C₂]

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
[C₁, C₂] → UU
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
(λ obd : [C₁, C₂] → UU,
 ∏ x y : [C₁, C₂],
 obd x → obd y → [C₁, C₂] ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU) ?pr1

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
[C₁, C₂] → UU
 exact (λ F, functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂).
    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
(λ obd : [C₁, C₂] → UU,
 ∏ x y : [C₁, C₂],
 obd x → obd y → [C₁, C₂] ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  (λ F : [C₁, C₂], functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂)
 exact (λ F₁ F₂ FE₁ FE₂ α, nat_trans_enrichment (pr1 α) FE₁ FE₂).
  Defined.

(xx : functor_enrichment_disp_cat_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
(λ _ : ∏ (x : [C₁, C₂])
       (xx : functor_enrichment_disp_cat_ob_mor x),
       xx -->[ identity x] xx,
 ∏ (x y z : [C₁, C₂]) (f : [C₁, C₂] ⟦ x, y ⟧)
 (g : [C₁, C₂] ⟦ y, z ⟧)
 (xx : functor_enrichment_disp_cat_ob_mor x)
 (yy : functor_enrichment_disp_cat_ob_mor y)
 (zz : functor_enrichment_disp_cat_ob_mor z),
 xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz)
  ?pr1

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ (x : [C₁, C₂])
(xx : functor_enrichment_disp_cat_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
 exact (λ F FE, id_trans_enrichment FE).
    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
(λ _ : ∏ (x : [C₁, C₂])
       (xx : functor_enrichment_disp_cat_ob_mor x),
       xx -->[ identity x] xx,
 ∏ (x y z : [C₁, C₂]) (f : [C₁, C₂] ⟦ x, y ⟧)
 (g : [C₁, C₂] ⟦ y, z ⟧)
 (xx : functor_enrichment_disp_cat_ob_mor x)
 (yy : functor_enrichment_disp_cat_ob_mor y)
 (zz : functor_enrichment_disp_cat_ob_mor z),
 xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz)
  (λ (F : [C₁, C₂])
   (FE : functor_enrichment_disp_cat_ob_mor F),
   id_trans_enrichment FE)
 exact (λ F₁ F₂ F₃ τ θ FE₁ FE₂ FE₃ τE θE, comp_trans_enrichment τE θE).
  Defined.

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
disp_cat_axioms [C₁, C₂]
  functor_enrichment_disp_cat_data
 abstract
        (repeat split ;
         intro ; intros ;
         try (apply isaprop_nat_trans_enrichment) ;
         apply isasetaprop ;
         apply isaprop_nat_trans_enrichment).
  Defined.

z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂ → FE₁ = FE₂

FE₁ = FE₂

FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
isPredicate is_functor_enrichment
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
pr1 FE₁ = pr1 FE₂

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
isPredicate is_functor_enrichment

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x: functor_enrichment_data F E₁ E₂
isaprop (is_functor_enrichment x)

        apply isaprop_is_functor_enrichment.
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
pr1 FE₁ = pr1 FE₂

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x: C₁
pr1 FE₁ x = pr1 FE₂ x

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
pr1 FE₁ x y = pr1 FE₂ x y

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
p:= pr1 τ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· FE₂ x y
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂
       (pr1 (identity_z_iso F) x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr1 (identity_z_iso F) y)
  #⊗ FE₁ x y · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y)
pr1 FE₁ x y = pr1 FE₂ x y

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
p:= pr1 τ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· FE₂ x y
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (identity (pr1 F x))
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (identity (pr1 F y))
  #⊗ FE₁ x y · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y)
pr1 FE₁ x y = pr1 FE₂ x y

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
p: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· FE₂ x y #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr1 F x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_id E₂ (pr1 F y) #⊗ FE₁ x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y)
pr1 FE₁ x y = pr1 FE₂ x y

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
pr1 FE₁ x y =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_id E₂ (pr1 F y) #⊗ FE₁ x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y)
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· FE₂ x y #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr1 F x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y) = pr1 FE₂ x y

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
pr1 FE₁ x y =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_id E₂ (pr1 F y) #⊗ FE₁ x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y)
 
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
pr1 FE₁ x y =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y · FE₁ y y) #⊗ FE₁ x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
pr1 FE₁ x y =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · FE₁ y y #⊗ FE₁ x y)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
pr1 FE₁ x y =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (FE₁ y y #⊗ FE₁ x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y)))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
pr1 FE₁ x y =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E₁ x y y · FE₁ x y))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
pr1 FE₁ x y =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x y y · FE₁ x y)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x y y · FE₁ x y) = pr1 FE₁ x y

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x y y · FE₁ x y) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
?b = pr1 FE₁ x y

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x y y · FE₁ x y) = ?b

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y · FE₁ x y = ?t2

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y = ?y'

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
?y' =
enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₁ x y y

          exact (enrichment_id_left E₁ x y).
        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) · FE₁ x y) = pr1 FE₁ x y

τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂

mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) · FE₁ x y = pr1 FE₁ x y

τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) · FE₁ x y = ?b

τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
?b = pr1 FE₁ x y

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂

· mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) · FE₁ x y = ?b

          
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) = ?y'

          apply mon_linvunitor_lunitor.
        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) · FE₁ x y = pr1 FE₁ x y

        apply id_left.
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· FE₂ x y #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr1 F x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y) = pr1 FE₂ x y
 
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· FE₂ x y #⊗ (enriched_id E₁ x · FE₂ x x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y) = pr1 FE₂ x y

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
   · FE₂ x y #⊗ FE₂ x x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y) = pr1 FE₂ x y

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
   · (FE₂ x y #⊗ FE₂ x x
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y))) =
pr1 FE₂ x y

τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
   · (enriched_comp E₁ x x y · FE₂ x y)) = pr1 FE₂ x y

· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
   · enriched_comp E₁ x x y · FE₂ x y) = pr1 FE₂ x y

· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
   · enriched_comp E₁ x x y · FE₂ x y) = ?b

x, y: C₁
?y' =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₁ x
· enriched_comp E₁ x x y

          exact (enrichment_id_right E₁ x y).

· (mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) · FE₂ x y) = pr1 FE₂ x y

τ: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂
