        apply id_left.
    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: [C₁, C₂]
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment_disp_cat F
isaprop (FE₁ = FE₂)
 apply isaset_functor_enrichment.
    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: [C₁, C₂]
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment_disp_cat F
isaprop (z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) FE₁ FE₂)
 
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: [C₁, C₂]
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment_disp_cat F
isPredicate (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F))
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: [C₁, C₂]
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment_disp_cat F
∏ x y : FE₁ -->[ identity_z_iso F] FE₂,
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) x
→ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) y → x = y

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: [C₁, C₂]
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment_disp_cat F
isPredicate (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F))
 
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: [C₁, C₂]
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment_disp_cat F
x: FE₁ -->[ identity_z_iso F] FE₂
isaprop (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) x)

        apply isaprop_is_z_iso_disp.
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: [C₁, C₂]
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment_disp_cat F
∏ x y : FE₁ -->[ identity_z_iso F] FE₂,
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) x
→ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) y → x = y
 
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F: [C₁, C₂]
FE₁, FE₂: functor_enrichment_disp_cat F
x, y: FE₁ -->[ identity_z_iso F] FE₂
X: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) x
X0: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) y
x = y

        apply isaprop_nat_trans_enrichment.
  Qed.

  (**
   1. The category of enriched functors
   *)
  Definition enriched_functor_category
    : category
    := total_category functor_enrichment_disp_cat.

  (**
   2. This category is univalent
   *)
  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
HC₂: is_univalent C₂
is_univalent enriched_functor_category

  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
HC₂: is_univalent C₂
is_univalent enriched_functor_category

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
HC₂: is_univalent C₂
is_univalent [C₁, C₂]
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
HC₂: is_univalent C₂
is_univalent_disp functor_enrichment_disp_cat

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
HC₂: is_univalent C₂
is_univalent [C₁, C₂]
 
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
HC₂: is_univalent C₂
is_univalent C₂

      exact HC₂.
    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
HC₂: is_univalent C₂
is_univalent_disp functor_enrichment_disp_cat
 exact is_univalent_disp_functor_enrichment_disp_cat.
  Defined.
End EnrichedFunctorCategory.

Definition enriched_univalent_functor_category
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           (C₁ C₂ : univalent_category)
           (E₁ : enrichment C₁ V)
           (E₂ : enrichment C₂ V)
  : univalent_category
  := enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ,, is_univalent_enriched_functor_cat _ _ (pr2 C₂).

(**
 3. Operations on the enriched functor category
 *)

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso F G
is_nat_z_iso (pr111 τ)


V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: z_iso F G
is_nat_z_iso (pr111 τ)

  exact (pr2 (nat_z_iso_from_z_iso _ (z_iso_base_from_total τ))).
Defined.

Definition comp_enriched_functor_category
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ C₃ : category}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           {E₃ : enrichment C₃ V}
           (F : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂)
           (G : enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃)
  : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
  := pr1 F ∙ pr1 G
     ,,
     functor_comp_enrichment (pr2 F) (pr2 G).


V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃ ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category F G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category F G₂ ⟧


V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃ ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category F G₁,
comp_enriched_functor_category F G₂ ⟧

  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃ ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
[C₁, C₃] ⟦ pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F G₁),
pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F G₂) ⟧
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃ ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
(λ f : [C₁, C₃]
       ⟦ pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F G₁),
       pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F G₂) ⟧,
 pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category F G₁) -->[
 f] pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category F G₂)) ?pr1

  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃ ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
[C₁, C₃] ⟦ pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F G₁),
pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F G₂) ⟧
 exact (pre_whisker (pr11 F) (pr1 τ)).
  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃ ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
(λ f : [C₁, C₃]
       ⟦ pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F G₁),
       pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F G₂) ⟧,
 pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category F G₁) -->[
 f] pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category F G₂))
  (pre_whisker (pr11 F) (pr1 τ))
 
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
G₁, G₂: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃ ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
nat_trans_enrichment (pr1 τ) (pr2 G₁) (pr2 G₂)

    exact (pr2 τ).
Defined.


V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
F₁, F₂: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
G: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃
enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category F₁ G,
comp_enriched_functor_category F₂ G ⟧


V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
F₁, F₂: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
G: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃
enriched_functor_category E₁ E₃
⟦ comp_enriched_functor_category F₁ G,
comp_enriched_functor_category F₂ G ⟧

  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
F₁, F₂: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
G: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃
[C₁, C₃] ⟦ pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F₁ G),
pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F₂ G) ⟧
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
F₁, F₂: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
G: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃
(λ f : [C₁, C₃]
       ⟦ pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F₁ G),
       pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F₂ G) ⟧,
 pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category F₁ G) -->[
 f] pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category F₂ G)) ?pr1

  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
F₁, F₂: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
G: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃
[C₁, C₃] ⟦ pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F₁ G),
pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F₂ G) ⟧
 exact (post_whisker (pr1 τ) (pr1 G)).
  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
F₁, F₂: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
G: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃
(λ f : [C₁, C₃]
       ⟦ pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F₁ G),
       pr1 (comp_enriched_functor_category F₂ G) ⟧,
 pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category F₁ G) -->[
 f] pr2 (comp_enriched_functor_category F₂ G))
  (post_whisker (pr1 τ) (pr1 G))
 
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
F₁, F₂: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
G: enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃
nat_trans_enrichment (pr1 τ) (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)

    exact (pr2 τ).
Defined.

Definition lassociator_enriched_functor_category
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ C₃ C₄ : category}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           {E₃ : enrichment C₃ V}
           {E₄ : enrichment C₄ V}
           (F : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂)
           (G : enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃)
           (H : enriched_functor_category E₃ E₄)
  : comp_enriched_functor_category (comp_enriched_functor_category F G) H
    -->
    comp_enriched_functor_category F (comp_enriched_functor_category G H)
  := nat_trans_id _ ,, lassociator_enrichment (pr2 F) (pr2 G) (pr2 H).

Definition rassociator_enriched_functor_category
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ C₃ C₄ : category}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           {E₃ : enrichment C₃ V}
           {E₄ : enrichment C₄ V}
           (F : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂)
           (G : enriched_functor_category E₂ E₃)
           (H : enriched_functor_category E₃ E₄)
  : comp_enriched_functor_category F (comp_enriched_functor_category G H)
    -->
    comp_enriched_functor_category (comp_enriched_functor_category F G) H
  := nat_trans_id _ ,, rassociator_enrichment (pr2 F) (pr2 G) (pr2 H).

(**
 4. The enrichment
 *)
Section EnrichedFunctorCategory.
  Context {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
          {C₁ C₂ : category}
          (E₁ : enrichment C₁ V)
          (E₂ : enrichment C₂ V)
          (EqV : Equalizers V)
          (PV : Products C₁ V)
          (PV' : Products (C₁ × C₁) V).

  Definition hom_functor_on_functors
             (F G : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
    : category_binproduct (C₁^opp) C₁ ⟶ V
    := pair_functor (functor_op F) G ∙ enriched_hom_functor E₂.

  Section FunctorEnrichmentConstruction.
    Context {F G : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
            (EF : functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂)
            (EG : functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂).

    Let P₁ : Product C₁ V (λ x, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      := PV (λ x, E₂ ⦃ F x , G x ⦄).

    Let P₂ : Product
               (C₁ × C₁)
               V
               (λ xy, (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
      := PV' (λ xy, E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy , pr2 xy ⦄ ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy) , G (pr2 xy) ⦄)).

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
x, y: C₁
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄, (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄)
⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
x, y: C₁
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄, (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄)
⟧

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
x, y: C₁
V ⟦ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄), E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄
⟧

      exact (sym_mon_braiding _ _ _
             · (EG _ _ #⊗ identity _)
             · enriched_comp _ _ _ _).
    Defined.

    Let σ : ∏ (x y : C₁), E₂ ⦃ F x , G x ⦄ --> (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x , G y ⦄)
      := enriched_functor_left_map_ob.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄, (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄)
⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄, (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄)
⟧

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
V ⟦ (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄), E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄
⟧

      exact ((identity _ #⊗ EF _ _)
             · enriched_comp _ _ _ _).
    Defined.

    Let ρ : ∏ (x y : C₁), E₂ ⦃ F y , G y ⦄ --> (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x , G y ⦄)
      := enriched_functor_right_map_ob.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
V ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
V ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
∏ i : C₁ × C₁,
V ⟦ P₁,
(λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
 (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
 ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)) i ⟧

      exact (λ xy, ProductPr _ _ _ (pr1 xy) · σ (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)).
    Defined.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
V ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
V ⟦ P₁, P₂ ⟧

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
∏ i : C₁ × C₁,
V ⟦ P₁,
(λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
 (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
 ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)) i ⟧

      exact (λ xy, ProductPr _ _ _ (pr2 xy) · ρ (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy)).
    Defined.

    Definition enriched_functor_hom
      : Equalizer enriched_functor_left_map enriched_functor_right_map
      := EqV _ _ enriched_functor_left_map enriched_functor_right_map.

    Definition enriched_functor_hom_pr
               (i : C₁)
      : enriched_functor_hom --> E₂ ⦃ F i, G i ⦄
      := EqualizerArrow _ · ProductPr _ _ _ i.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
i, j: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_pr i · σ i j =
enriched_functor_hom_pr j · ρ i j

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
i, j: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_pr i · σ i j =
enriched_functor_hom_pr j · ρ i j

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
i, j: C₁
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ enriched_functor_hom, P₂ ⟧,
   z · ProductPr (∑ _ : C₁, C₁) V P₂ (i,, j))
  (EqualizerEqAr enriched_functor_hom): (λ z : V ⟦ enriched_functor_hom, P₂ ⟧,
 z · ProductPr (∑ _ : C₁, C₁) V P₂ (i,, j))
  (EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
   · enriched_functor_left_map) =
(λ z : V ⟦ enriched_functor_hom, P₂ ⟧,
 z · ProductPr (∑ _ : C₁, C₁) V P₂ (i,, j))
  (EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
   · enriched_functor_right_map)
enriched_functor_hom_pr i · σ i j =
enriched_functor_hom_pr j · ρ i j

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
i, j: C₁
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ enriched_functor_hom, P₂ ⟧,
   z · ProductPr (∑ _ : C₁, C₁) V P₂ (i,, j))
  (EqualizerEqAr enriched_functor_hom): EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· enriched_functor_left_map
· ProductPr (∑ _ : C₁, C₁) V P₂ (i,, j) =
EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· enriched_functor_right_map
· ProductPr (∑ _ : C₁, C₁) V P₂ (i,, j)
enriched_functor_hom_pr i · σ i j =
enriched_functor_hom_pr j · ρ i j

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
i, j: C₁
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ enriched_functor_hom, P₂ ⟧,
   z · ProductPr (∑ _ : C₁, C₁) V P₂ (i,, j))
  (EqualizerEqAr enriched_functor_hom): EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· ProductArrow (C₁ × C₁) V P₂
    (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
     ProductPr C₁ V P₁ (pr1 xy)
     · σ (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy))
· ProductPr (∑ _ : C₁, C₁) V P₂ (i,, j) =
EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· enriched_functor_right_map
· ProductPr (∑ _ : C₁, C₁) V P₂ (i,, j)
enriched_functor_hom_pr i · σ i j =
enriched_functor_hom_pr j · ρ i j

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
i, j: C₁
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ enriched_functor_hom, P₂ ⟧,
   z · ProductPr (∑ _ : C₁, C₁) V P₂ (i,, j))
  (EqualizerEqAr enriched_functor_hom): EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· ProductArrow (C₁ × C₁) V P₂
    (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
     ProductPr C₁ V P₁ (pr1 xy)
     · σ (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy))
· ProductPr (∑ _ : C₁, C₁) V P₂ (i,, j) =
EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· ProductArrow (C₁ × C₁) V P₂
    (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
     ProductPr C₁ V P₁ (pr2 xy)
     · ρ (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy))
· ProductPr (∑ _ : C₁, C₁) V P₂ (i,, j)
enriched_functor_hom_pr i · σ i j =
enriched_functor_hom_pr j · ρ i j

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
i, j: C₁
p: EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· (ProductArrow (C₁ × C₁) V P₂
     (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
      ProductPr C₁ V P₁ (pr1 xy)
      · σ (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy))
   · ProductPr (∑ _ : C₁, C₁) V P₂ (i,, j)) =
EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· (ProductArrow (C₁ × C₁) V P₂
     (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
      ProductPr C₁ V P₁ (pr2 xy)
      · ρ (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy))
   · ProductPr (∑ _ : C₁, C₁) V P₂ (i,, j))
enriched_functor_hom_pr i · σ i j =
enriched_functor_hom_pr j · ρ i j

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
i, j: C₁
p: EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· (ProductPr C₁ V P₁ (pr1 (i,, j))
   · σ (pr1 (i,, j)) (pr2 (i,, j))) =
EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· (ProductPr C₁ V P₁ (pr2 (i,, j))
   · ρ (pr1 (i,, j)) (pr2 (i,, j)))
enriched_functor_hom_pr i · σ i j =
enriched_functor_hom_pr j · ρ i j

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
i, j: C₁
p: EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· ProductPr C₁ V P₁ (pr1 (i,, j))
· σ (pr1 (i,, j)) (pr2 (i,, j)) =
EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· ProductPr C₁ V P₁ (pr2 (i,, j))
· ρ (pr1 (i,, j)) (pr2 (i,, j))
enriched_functor_hom_pr i · σ i j =
enriched_functor_hom_pr j · ρ i j

      exact p.
    Qed.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ enriched_functor_hom,
         (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧,
   z #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄))
  (enriched_functor_hom_eq x y): (λ z : V ⟦ enriched_functor_hom,
       (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧,
 z #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
 · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄))
  (enriched_functor_hom_pr x · σ x y) =
(λ z : V ⟦ enriched_functor_hom,
       (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧,
 z #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
 · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄))
  (enriched_functor_hom_pr y · ρ x y)
sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ enriched_functor_hom,
         (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧,
   z #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄))
  (enriched_functor_hom_eq x y): (enriched_functor_hom_pr x · σ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr y · ρ x y)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄)
sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
p: enriched_functor_hom_pr x
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· σ x y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· ρ x y #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄)
sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
p: enriched_functor_hom_pr x
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob x y
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob x y
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄)
sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
p: enriched_functor_hom_pr x
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     · EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
     · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
     · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄)
sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
p: enriched_functor_hom_pr x
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄))
sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
p: enriched_functor_hom_pr x
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
     (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y))
sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
p: enriched_functor_hom_pr x
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
· EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
· EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
x, y: C₁
p: sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
sym_mon_braiding V enriched_functor_hom (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      exact p.
    Qed.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
fv: ∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ F i, G i ⦄ ⟧
p: ∏ x y : C₁, fv x · σ x y = fv y · ρ x y
V ⟦ v, enriched_functor_hom ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
fv: ∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ F i, G i ⦄ ⟧
p: ∏ x y : C₁, fv x · σ x y = fv y · ρ x y
V ⟦ v, enriched_functor_hom ⟧

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
fv: ∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ F i, G i ⦄ ⟧
p: ∏ x y : C₁, fv x · σ x y = fv y · ρ x y
V ⟦ v, P₁ ⟧
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
fv: ∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ F i, G i ⦄ ⟧
p: ∏ x y : C₁, fv x · σ x y = fv y · ρ x y
?h · enriched_functor_left_map =
?h · enriched_functor_right_map

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
fv: ∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ F i, G i ⦄ ⟧
p: ∏ x y : C₁, fv x · σ x y = fv y · ρ x y
V ⟦ v, P₁ ⟧
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
fv: ∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ F i, G i ⦄ ⟧
p: ∏ x y : C₁, fv x · σ x y = fv y · ρ x y
∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ v, (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄) i ⟧

        exact fv.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
fv: ∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ F i, G i ⦄ ⟧
p: ∏ x y : C₁, fv x · σ x y = fv y · ρ x y
ProductArrow C₁ V P₁ fv · enriched_functor_left_map =
ProductArrow C₁ V P₁ fv · enriched_functor_right_map
 abstract
          (use ProductArrow_eq ;
           intros xy ;
           unfold enriched_functor_left_map ;
           unfold enriched_functor_right_map ;
           rewrite !assoc' ;
           rewrite !(ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ P₂) ;
           rewrite !assoc ;
           rewrite !(ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ P₁) ;
           apply p).
    Defined.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
fv: ∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ F i, G i ⦄ ⟧
p: ∏ x y : C₁, fv x · σ x y = fv y · ρ x y
i: C₁
mor_to_enriched_functor_hom fv p
· enriched_functor_hom_pr i = fv i

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
fv: ∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ F i, G i ⦄ ⟧
p: ∏ x y : C₁, fv x · σ x y = fv y · ρ x y
i: C₁
mor_to_enriched_functor_hom fv p
· enriched_functor_hom_pr i = fv i

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
fv: ∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ F i, G i ⦄ ⟧
p: ∏ x y : C₁, fv x · σ x y = fv y · ρ x y
i: C₁
EqualizerIn enriched_functor_hom v
  (ProductArrow C₁ V P₁ fv)
  (mor_to_enriched_functor_hom_subproof v fv p)
· (EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
   · ProductPr C₁ V P₁ i) = fv i

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
fv: ∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ F i, G i ⦄ ⟧
p: ∏ x y : C₁, fv x · σ x y = fv y · ρ x y
i: C₁
EqualizerIn enriched_functor_hom v
  (ProductArrow C₁ V P₁ fv)
  (mor_to_enriched_functor_hom_subproof v fv p)
· EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· ProductPr C₁ V P₁ i = fv i

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
fv: ∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ F i, G i ⦄ ⟧
p: ∏ x y : C₁, fv x · σ x y = fv y · ρ x y
i: C₁
ProductArrow C₁ V P₁ fv · ProductPr C₁ V P₁ i = fv i

      apply (ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ P₁).
    Qed.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
f, g: V ⟦ v, enriched_functor_hom ⟧
p: ∏ x : C₁,
f · enriched_functor_hom_pr x =
g · enriched_functor_hom_pr x
f = g

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
f, g: V ⟦ v, enriched_functor_hom ⟧
p: ∏ x : C₁,
f · enriched_functor_hom_pr x =
g · enriched_functor_hom_pr x
f = g

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
f, g: V ⟦ v, enriched_functor_hom ⟧
p: ∏ x : C₁,
f · enriched_functor_hom_pr x =
g · enriched_functor_hom_pr x
f · EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom =
g · EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
f, g: V ⟦ v, enriched_functor_hom ⟧
p: ∏ x : C₁,
f · enriched_functor_hom_pr x =
g · enriched_functor_hom_pr x
∏ i : C₁,
f · EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· ProductPr C₁ V P₁ i =
g · EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· ProductPr C₁ V P₁ i

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
f, g: V ⟦ v, enriched_functor_hom ⟧
p: ∏ x : C₁,
f · enriched_functor_hom_pr x =
g · enriched_functor_hom_pr x
x: C₁
f · EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· ProductPr C₁ V P₁ x =
g · EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
· ProductPr C₁ V P₁ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
P₁:= PV (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄): Product C₁ V (λ x : C₁, E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
P₂:= PV'
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄)): Product (C₁ × C₁) V
  (λ xy : C₁ × C₁,
   (E₁ ⦃ pr1 xy, pr2 xy ⦄)
   ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F (pr1 xy), G (pr2 xy) ⦄))
σ:= enriched_functor_left_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
ρ:= enriched_functor_right_map_ob: ∏ x y : C₁,
V ⟦ E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄,
(E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊸ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) ⟧
v: V
f, g: V ⟦ v, enriched_functor_hom ⟧
p: ∏ x : C₁,
f · enriched_functor_hom_pr x =
g · enriched_functor_hom_pr x
x: C₁
f
· (EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
   · ProductPr C₁ V P₁ x) =
g
· (EqualizerArrow enriched_functor_hom
   · ProductPr C₁ V P₁ x)

      exact (p x).
    Defined.
  End FunctorEnrichmentConstruction.

  Section EnrichmentIdentity.
    Context {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
            (EF : functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂).

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
enriched_id E₂ (F x)
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob EF x y =
enriched_id E₂ (F y)
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
enriched_id E₂ (F x)
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob EF x y =
enriched_id E₂ (F y)
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧),
(enriched_id E₂ (F x)
 · enriched_functor_left_map_ob EF x y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) =
(enriched_id E₂ (F y)
 · enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_id E₂ (F x)
 · enriched_functor_left_map_ob EF x y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) =
(enriched_id E₂ (F y)
 · enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E₂ (F x) #⊗ h
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob EF x y
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) =
enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ h
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E₂ (F x) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     · EF x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
     · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) =
enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
     · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E₂ (F x) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · (EF x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y)))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)) =
enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E₂ (F x) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (EF x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y))) =
enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E₂ (F x) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EF x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y) =
enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ h
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· h #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
· EF x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y) =
enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ h
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· (h #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
   · (EF x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y))) =
enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· (h #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
   · (EF x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· (h #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
   · (EF x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
h #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
· (EF x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
h #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
· EF x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V

EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(h · EF x y)
#⊗ (enriched_id E₂ (F x) · identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F x ⦄))
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y) = ?t2

EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(h · EF x y) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V

PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(h · EF x y) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(h · EF x y) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (F x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F x) (F y)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(h · EF x y) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· ((h · EF x y) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)) =
enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y))

EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· ((h · EF x y) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄))

x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y)) = ?b

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· ((h · EF x y) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄))

x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y)) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ h
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, F y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_id E₂ (F y) · identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, F y ⦄))
#⊗ (h · EF x y) · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y) =
?b

EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ (h · EF x y)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V

PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · EF x y)
· enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
