EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · EF x y)
· (enriched_id E₂ (F y) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (F y)) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · EF x y)
· mon_lunitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) = ?b

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ (h · EF x y)
· mon_lunitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· ((h · EF x y) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lunitor a · (h · EF x y) =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· ((h · EF x y) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lunitor a · (h · EF x y) =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· (mon_runitor a · (h · EF x y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lunitor a · h · EF x y =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a · mon_runitor a · h
· EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lunitor a =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a · mon_runitor a

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lunitor a = mon_lunitor a

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EF ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EF ⟧

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₂ ⦃ F i, F i ⦄ ⟧
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ x y : C₁,
?fv x · enriched_functor_left_map_ob EF x y =
?fv y · enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₂ ⦃ F i, F i ⦄ ⟧
 exact (λ x, enriched_id E₂ (F x)).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
∏ x y : C₁,
(λ x0 : C₁, enriched_id E₂ (F x0)) x
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob EF x y =
(λ x0 : C₁, enriched_id E₂ (F x0)) y
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y
 exact enriched_functor_hom_id_eq.
    Defined.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_id
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EF x =
enriched_id E₂ (F x)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_id
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EF x =
enriched_id E₂ (F x)

      exact (mor_to_enriched_functor_hom_pr
               EF EF
               _
               _
               x).
    Qed.
  End EnrichmentIdentity.

  Section EnrichmentComp.
    Context {F G H : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
            (EF : functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂)
            (EG : functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂)
            (EH : functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂).

    Definition enriched_functor_hom_comp_data
               (x : C₁)
      : enriched_functor_hom EG EH ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG
        -->
        E₂ ⦃ F x , H x ⦄
      := enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
         · enriched_comp _ _ _ _.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_comp_data x
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob EH x y =
enriched_functor_hom_comp_data y
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_comp_data x
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob EH x y =
enriched_functor_hom_comp_data y
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob EH x y =
enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧),
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
 · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
 · enriched_functor_left_map_ob EH x y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, H y ⦄) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y
 · enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
 · enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, H y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
 · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
 · enriched_functor_left_map_ob EH x y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, H y ⦄) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y
 · enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
 · enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, H y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob EH x y
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, H y ⦄) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, H y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     · EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
     · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, H y ⦄) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_lam
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
     · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, H y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
         · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y)))
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, H y ⦄))) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (internal_lam
        (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y))
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, H y ⦄)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y)))) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y)))) = 
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y)))) = 
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y)))) = 
?b0
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b0 = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y)))) = 
?b0

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y))) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  ((E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
· EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     ((E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
     (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
   · EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y)) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V
    ((E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
    (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
· EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
   ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· h
  #⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
      #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
· EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
   ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (h
   #⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
       #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
      · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y)))) = 
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
· (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
· EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, H x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
EH x y #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
EH x y
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ H x, H y ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
EH x y
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ H x, H y ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (H x) (H y)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
EH x y
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ H x, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
     #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
EH x y
#⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ H x, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
EH x y
#⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ H x, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
   ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (h
   #⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
       #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
        #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
        #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y))) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
   ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (h
   #⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
       #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
        #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
        #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
   ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (h
   #⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
       #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
        #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
        #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
   ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (h
   #⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
       #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
        #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
        #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y))) = ?b0
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b0 = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
   ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (h
   #⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
       #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
        #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
        #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y))) = ?b0

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
h
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
    #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
     #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
     #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y)) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
h
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
    #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator a (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
· (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x)
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
   ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (mon_rassociator a (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
     (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
   · (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x)
     #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
   · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
     #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
     #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y)) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
   ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· mon_rassociator a (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
    (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
· (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x)
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
   ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· mon_rassociator a (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
    (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity
  (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
   ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⊗ a)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
      ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
   · mon_rassociator a (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
       (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· mon_rassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
    (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
      ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
   · mon_rassociator a (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
       (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (mon_rassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
     (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
   · (sym_mon_braiding V
        (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
         ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
      · mon_rassociator a (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
          (enriched_functor_hom EF EG))) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
      ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
   · mon_rassociator a (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
       (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
     ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· mon_rassociator a (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
    (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) = ?t2

        apply sym_mon_hexagon_rassociator.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
        a
   · mon_rassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
       (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
     #⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG))
· (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x)
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
        a
   · mon_rassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
       (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
     #⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG))
· (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x)
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
        a
   · mon_rassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
       (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
     #⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG))
· (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x)
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
        a
   · (mon_rassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
        (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V
           (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
         #⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
         · ((h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x)
            #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
            · ((EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
               #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
               · (enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
                  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
                  · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y))))))) =
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
#⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
· ((h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x)
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
   · ((EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · (enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
         #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y)))) = 
?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
#⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
· (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x)
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
 · h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
 · EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y))
#⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
    · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
    · identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
    · identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
 · h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
 · EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y))
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
    · identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
    · identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
 · h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
 · EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y))
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

EqV: Equalizers V

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂

a: V

sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
· h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
· EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

x, y: C₁
a: V

sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
· (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
   · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y))) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V

· (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
   · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y))) = ?b

C₁, C₂: category

x, y: C₁
a: V

a: V

· (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
   · (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
· (EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
· EH x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(h · EH x y)
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
    · identity (E₂ ⦃ G x, H x ⦄))
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(h · EH x y) #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y) = ?t2

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
h #⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
· EH x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y) = ?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
· (h #⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
   · EH x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
· h #⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
· EH x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
    (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EH x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
     (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (EH x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
      · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y))) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EH x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (H x) (H y)) = ?t2

        exact (enriched_functor_hom_eq' EG EH x y).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
        a
   · (mon_rassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
        (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
      · ((identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h
          · (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y #⊗ EG x y
             · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (H y)))
         #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y)))) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
        a
   · (mon_rassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
        (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
      · ((identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h
          · (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y #⊗ EG x y
             · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (H y)))
         #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y)))) = 
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
        a
   · (mon_rassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
        (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
      · ((identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h
          · (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y #⊗ EG x y
             · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (H y)))
         #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y)))) = 
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h
 · (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y #⊗ EG x y
    · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (H y)))
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h
 · enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y #⊗ EG x y
 · enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (H y))
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h
 · enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y #⊗ EG x y)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h
 · enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y #⊗ EG x y)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· (enriched_comp E₂ (G x) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H y)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h
 · enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y #⊗ EG x y)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄)
     #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h
 · enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y #⊗ EG x y)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h
 · enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y #⊗ EG x y)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y #⊗ EG x y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· ((enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y #⊗ EG x y)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· (mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
     (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
     #⊗ (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))) = 
?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) #⊗ h)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
    (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
  #⊗ (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
· identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  #⊗ (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
  #⊗ (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)) = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
        a
   · (mon_rassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
        (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
      · (mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
           a (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
         · identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
           #⊗ (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
         · enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
           #⊗ (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y)))) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂

mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
        a
   · (mon_rassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
        (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
      · (mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
           a (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
         · identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
           #⊗ (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
         · enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
           #⊗ (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y)))) = 
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)))

  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a

   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)

           #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y)))) = 
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
· (mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
     (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
   · identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
     #⊗ (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
     #⊗ (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄)
     #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
· mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH) a
    (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
· identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  #⊗ (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
  #⊗ (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity
  (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
   ⊗ (a ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG))
· identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  #⊗ (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
  #⊗ (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
        a
   · (identity
        (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
         ⊗ (a ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG))
      · identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
        #⊗ (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
      · enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
        #⊗ (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄)
        #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y))) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V

EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
        a
   · (identity
        (enriched_functor_hom EG EH
         ⊗ (a ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG))
      · identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
        #⊗ (h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
      · enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
        #⊗ (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄)
        #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)))

  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a

   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
    · h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
  #⊗ (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄))

  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)

(identity (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
 · enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 · identity (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄))
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
    · h #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
    · EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (h #⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
· EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· h #⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
    (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
     (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
      · (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)))) = 
?t2

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
   · (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))) = ?t2
