C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
   · EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) = ?t2

        exact (enriched_functor_hom_eq' EF EG x y).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
   #⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
       · (enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
          · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)))
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y)) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
   #⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
       · (enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
          · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)))
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y)) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
   #⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
       · (enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
          · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)))
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y)) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
#⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
    · (enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
       · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)))
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
#⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
    · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
    · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y))
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
#⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
    · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
#⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
    · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G y) (H y)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
#⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
    · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
     #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· (enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
   #⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
       · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
        #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y))) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
  #⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
      · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (H y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
  #⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
      · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
  #⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
      · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
  #⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
      · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
  #⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) #⊗ h
      · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
  #⊗ ((identity (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
       · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y)
      #⊗ (h · EF x y))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (enriched_functor_hom EG EH)
  (enriched_functor_hom EF EG) a
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
  #⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ (h · EF x y))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ (h · EF x y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ (h · EF x y)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ (h · EF x y)
· identity
    ((E₂ ⦃ G y, H y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄)
     ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)) = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ (h · EF x y) =
?y'

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ (h · EF x y)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ (h · EF x y)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, H y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ (h · EF x y)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y) #⊗ EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y
 · enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y))
#⊗ (h · EF x y · identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y
 · enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)) #⊗ (h · EF x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y
 · enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)) #⊗ (h · EF x y) =
(enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH y
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y
 · enriched_comp E₂ (F y) (G y) (H y)) #⊗ (h · EF x y)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
V
⟦ enriched_functor_hom EG EH
  ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG,
enriched_functor_hom EF EH ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
V
⟦ enriched_functor_hom EG EH
  ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG,
enriched_functor_hom EF EH ⟧

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
∏ i : C₁,
V
⟦ enriched_functor_hom EG EH
  ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG, E₂ ⦃ F i, H i ⦄ ⟧
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
∏ x y : C₁,
?fv x · enriched_functor_left_map_ob EH x y =
?fv y · enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
∏ i : C₁,
V
⟦ enriched_functor_hom EG EH
  ⊗ enriched_functor_hom EF EG, E₂ ⦃ F i, H i ⦄ ⟧
 exact enriched_functor_hom_comp_data.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
∏ x y : C₁,
enriched_functor_hom_comp_data x
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob EH x y =
enriched_functor_hom_comp_data y
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y
 exact enriched_functor_hom_comp_laws.
    Defined.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_comp
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EH x =
enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_comp
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EH x =
enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x: C₁
mor_to_enriched_functor_hom EF EH
  enriched_functor_hom_comp_data
  enriched_functor_hom_comp_laws
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EH x =
enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
EH: functor_enrichment H E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_comp_data x =
enriched_functor_hom_pr EG EH x
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (H x)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.
  End EnrichmentComp.

  Section EnrichmentFromArr.
    Context {F G : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
            {τ : F ⟹ G}
            {EF : functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂}
            {EG : functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂}
            (Eτ : nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG).

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob EG x y =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y)
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob EG x y =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y)
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob EG x y =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y)
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧),
(enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
 · enriched_functor_left_map_ob EG x y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) =
(enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y)
 · enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
(enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
 · enriched_functor_left_map_ob EG x y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) =
(enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y)
 · enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ h
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob EG x y
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     · EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
     · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
     · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄)) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ F x, G y ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· (h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
   · (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· (h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
   · (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y))

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =

· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· (h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
   · (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))) = ?b

τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =

· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y

· (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) = ?t2

C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V

PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V

τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =

· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y

h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b = ?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y

h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧

· (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) = ?b

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) = ?y'

          apply tensor_split'.
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
h #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· (EG x y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ F x, G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) = ?t2

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· (h #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · (EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a
· (h #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · (EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y))

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂

x, y: C₁

· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =

· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y

· (h #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · (EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V

τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} a · h #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) = ?b

τ: F ⟹ G

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)

· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y

· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))) = ?b

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V})
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V

τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))) = ?t2

EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =

· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)

   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) = ?t2

        exact p.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
p:= Eτ x y: mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · (mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
         · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)))) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · (mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
         · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)))) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
?b =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ h = ?y'

        apply tensor_split.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · (mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
         · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y =
sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_runitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y =
mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y =
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ F y, G y ⦄) #⊗ EF x y =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x, y: C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ y) #⊗ EF x y

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

EqV: Equalizers V

τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V

τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₂ ⦃ F i, G i ⦄ ⟧
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
∏ x y : C₁,
?fv x · enriched_functor_left_map_ob EG x y =
?fv y · enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
∏ i : C₁, V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₂ ⦃ F i, G i ⦄ ⟧
 exact (λ x, enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
∏ x y : C₁,
(λ x0 : C₁, enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x0)) x
· enriched_functor_left_map_ob EG x y =
(λ x0 : C₁, enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x0)) y
· enriched_functor_right_map_ob EF x y
 exact enriched_functor_hom_from_arr_eq.
    Defined.

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_from_arr
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_from_arr
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
mor_to_enriched_functor_hom EF EG
  (λ x : C₁, enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x))
  enriched_functor_hom_from_arr_eq
· enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ G
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
Eτ: nat_trans_enrichment τ EF EG
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x) =
enriched_from_arr E₂ (τ x)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.
  End EnrichmentFromArr.

  Section EnrichmentToArr.
    Context {F G : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
            {EF : functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂}
            {EG : functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂}
            (τ : I_{V} --> enriched_functor_hom EF EG).

    Definition enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr_data
      : nat_trans_data F G
      := λ x, enriched_to_arr E₂ (τ · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x).

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
nat_trans_enrichment
  enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr_data EF EG

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
nat_trans_enrichment
  enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr_data EF EG

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
nat_trans_enrichment
  (λ x : C₁,
   enriched_to_arr E₂
     (τ · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)) EF EG

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂
       (enriched_to_arr E₂
          (τ · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x))
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E₂
    (enriched_to_arr E₂
       (τ · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y))
  #⊗ EF x y · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ (τ · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (τ · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y) #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ (τ · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (τ #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
x, y: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ τ
   · EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (τ #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
x, y: C₁
p:= enriched_functor_hom_eq' EF EG x y: sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ τ
   · EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (τ #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y)
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
x, y: C₁
p:= enriched_functor_hom_eq' EF EG x y: sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ τ
   · (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (τ #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
x, y: C₁
p:= enriched_functor_hom_eq' EF EG x y: sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ τ
   · (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
      · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (τ #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
        (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
         · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y))))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
x, y: C₁
p:= enriched_functor_hom_eq' EF EG x y: sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ τ
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· τ #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
    (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
x, y: C₁
p:= enriched_functor_hom_eq' EF EG x y: sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ τ =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· τ #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
    (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
x, y: C₁
p:= enriched_functor_hom_eq' EF EG x y: sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ τ =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (τ #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
       (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
x, y: C₁
p:= enriched_functor_hom_eq' EF EG x y: sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ τ =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ τ)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
x, y: C₁
p:= enriched_functor_hom_eq' EF EG x y: sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ τ =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ τ

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
x, y: C₁
p:= enriched_functor_hom_eq' EF EG x y: sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
x, y: C₁
p:= enriched_functor_hom_eq' EF EG x y: sym_mon_braiding V (enriched_functor_hom EF EG)
  (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (EG x y #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (G x) (G y)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr EF EG y #⊗ EF x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (F x) (F y) (G y)
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, y ⦄)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V

EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
nat_trans_data F G
 exact enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr_data.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
EF: functor_enrichment F E₁ E₂
EG: functor_enrichment G E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V}, enriched_functor_hom EF EG ⟧
is_nat_trans F G enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr_data
 exact (is_nat_trans_from_enrichment enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr_enrichment).
    Defined.
  End EnrichmentToArr.

→ enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ → V

→ V ⟦ I_{ V}, ?pr1 x y ⟧
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
(λ _ : ∏ x y : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
       enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
       → V ⟦ I_{ V}, ?pr1 x y ⟧,
 ∏ x y : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
 V ⟦ I_{ V}, ?pr1 x y ⟧
 → enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧) ?pr12

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
→ enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ → V
 exact (λ F G, enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G)).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ x : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
V ⟦ I_{ V},
(λ F G : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
 enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x x ⟧
 exact (λ F, enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 F)).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ x y z : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
V
⟦ (λ F G : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
   enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) y z
  ⊗ (λ F G : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
     enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x y,
(λ F G : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
 enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x z ⟧
 exact (λ F G H, enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 G) (pr2 H)).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ x y : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
→ V ⟦ I_{ V},
  (λ F G : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
   enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x y ⟧
 exact (λ F G τ, enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
(λ _ : ∏ x y : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
       enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
       → V ⟦ I_{ V},
         (λ F G : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
          enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x y ⟧,
 ∏ x y : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
 V ⟦ I_{ V},
 (λ F G : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
  enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G)) x y ⟧
 → enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
  (λ (F G : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂)
   (τ : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧),
   enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ))
 exact (λ F G τ,
             enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr τ
             ,,
             enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr_enrichment τ).
  Defined.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
enrichment_laws
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
enrichment_laws
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ x y : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
mon_lunitor
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
enriched_id enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  y
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y
      ⦄)
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data x y y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ x y : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
mon_runitor
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data x
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data x x y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ w x y z : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
enriched_comp
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data x y z
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x
      ⦄)
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data w x z =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity
    (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z
     ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp
       enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data w x y
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data w y z
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ (x y : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂)
(f : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_to_arr
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  (enriched_from_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data f) = f
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ (x y : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂)
(f : V ⟦ I_{ V},
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y
     ⦄ ⟧),
enriched_from_arr
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  (enriched_to_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data f) = f
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ x : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
enriched_to_arr
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  (enriched_id
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data x) =
identity x
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ (x y z : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂)
(f : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · g =
enriched_to_arr
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr
       enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data g
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr
          enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data f
   · enriched_comp
       enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data x y z)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ x y : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
mon_lunitor
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
enriched_id enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  y
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y
      ⦄)
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data x y y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
mon_lunitor
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄) =
enriched_id enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  G
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G
      ⦄)
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F G G

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
∏ x : C₁,
mon_lunitor
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x =
enriched_id enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  G
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G
      ⦄)
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F G G
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
mon_lunitor (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x =
enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 G)
#⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 G) (pr2 G)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

x: C₁
mon_lunitor (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x =
enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 G)
#⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 G) (pr2 G)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x)

x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 G)
#⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 G) (pr2 G)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x) =
mon_lunitor (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

· (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 G) (pr2 G)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x) = 
?b

x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 G) (pr2 G)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x = ?t2

        apply enriched_functor_hom_comp_comm.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 G)
#⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· (enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 G) (pr2 G) x
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x)) =
mon_lunitor (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 G)
#⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 G) (pr2 G) x
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) =

· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

x: C₁
(enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 G)
 · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 G) (pr2 G) x)
#⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
    · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) =
mon_lunitor (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

x: C₁
(enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 G)
 · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 G) (pr2 G) x)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) =
mon_lunitor (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

(enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 G)
 · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 G) (pr2 G) x)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) = 
?b

x: C₁
(enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 G)
 · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 G) (pr2 G) x)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) = 
?b

C₁, C₂: category
