E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 G)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 G) (pr2 G) x = ?y'

        apply enriched_functor_hom_id_comm.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_id E₂ (pr1 G x)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) =
mon_lunitor (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
· enriched_id E₂ (pr1 G x)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) =
mon_lunitor (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
· (enriched_id E₂ (pr1 G x)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x)) =
mon_lunitor (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
· (enriched_id E₂ (pr1 G x)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x)) =
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
· mon_lunitor (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_id E₂ (pr1 G x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x) =
mon_lunitor (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
mon_lunitor (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄) =
enriched_id E₂ (pr1 G x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 G x)

      apply enrichment_id_left.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ x y : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
mon_runitor
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data x
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data x x y

mon_runitor
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄) =
identity
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F F G

  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x =
identity
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F F G
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

mon_runitor (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x =
identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 F)
· enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 G)

· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 F)
    · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 F) x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) =
mon_runitor (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 F)
    · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 F) x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) = 
?b

EqV: Equalizers V

F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
?b =
mon_runitor (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 F)
    · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 F) x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) =

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 F)
    · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 F) x) = 
?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 F)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 F) x = ?t2

        apply enriched_functor_hom_id_comm.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
#⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr1 F x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) =
mon_runitor (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
#⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr1 F x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) =
mon_runitor (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
#⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr1 F x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)) =
mon_runitor (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
#⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr1 F x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
#⊗ identity I_{ V}
· mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr1 F x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) =
mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F x, pr1 G x ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr1 F x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x)

      apply enrichment_id_right.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ w x y z : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
enriched_comp
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data x y z
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x
      ⦄)
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data w x z =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity
    (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z
     ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp
       enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data w x y
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data w y z
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
enriched_comp
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F₂ F₃ F₄
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F₁,
      F₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F₁ F₂ F₄ =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F₃, F₄
   ⦄)
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F₂, F₃
   ⦄)
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F₁, F₂
   ⦄)
· identity
    (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F₃,
     F₄ ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp
       enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F₁ F₂
       F₃
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F₁ F₃ F₄

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
∏ x : C₁,
enriched_comp
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F₂ F₃ F₄
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F₁,
      F₂ ⦄)
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F₁ F₂ F₄
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F₃, F₄
   ⦄)
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F₂, F₃
   ⦄)
  (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F₁, F₂
   ⦄)
· identity
    (enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F₃,
     F₄ ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp
       enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F₁ F₂
       F₃
· enriched_comp
    enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F₁ F₃ F₄
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄)
#⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₄)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
       (pr2 F₃)
· enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x

PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V

x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄)
#⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
     (pr2 F₄)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x) =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))

   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
        (pr2 F₃)
   · (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃)
        (pr2 F₄)
      · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x))

· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₄ x) =

x: C₁
(enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄)
 · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₄) x)
#⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
    · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₄ x) =

  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))

· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x

 · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₄) x)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₄ x) =

PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
?b =

  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))

       (pr2 F₃)
· enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
(enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄)
 · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₄) x)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₄ x) =
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₄) x = ?y'

        apply enriched_functor_hom_comp_comm.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
(enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x
 · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x))
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₄ x) =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
       (pr2 F₃)
· enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
(enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x)
#⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x)
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₄ x) =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
       (pr2 F₃)
· enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
(enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x)
#⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· (enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x)
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₄ x)) =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· (identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
        (pr2 F₃)
   · (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃)
        (pr2 F₄)
      · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
(enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x)
#⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· (enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x)
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₄ x)) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
?b =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· (identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
        (pr2 F₃)
   · (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃)
        (pr2 F₄)
      · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
(enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x)
#⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· (enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x)
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₄ x)) =
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₄ x) =
?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
identity
  ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₂ x, pr1 F₃ x ⦄))
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₁ x, pr1 F₂ x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₄ x) =
?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
identity
  ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₂ x, pr1 F₃ x ⦄))
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x
· (enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₁ x, pr1 F₂ x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₄ x)) =
?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₁ x, pr1 F₂ x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₄ x) =
?t2

        apply enrichment_assoc.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
(enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x)
#⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· (identity
     ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₂ x, pr1 F₃ x ⦄))
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₂ x, pr1 F₃ x ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₁ x, pr1 F₂ x ⦄)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
        #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x)
             (pr1 F₃ x)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₃ x)
          (pr1 F₄ x))) =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· (identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
        (pr2 F₃)
   · (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃)
        (pr2 F₄)
      · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
(enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x)
#⊗ identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· identity
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
     ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₂ x, pr1 F₃ x ⦄))
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₂ x, pr1 F₃ x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₁ x, pr1 F₂ x ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x) =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
       (pr2 F₃)
· enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
(enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x
 · identity
     ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₂ x, pr1 F₃ x ⦄)))
#⊗ (identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
    · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₂ x, pr1 F₃ x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₁ x, pr1 F₂ x ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x) =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
       (pr2 F₃)
· enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
(enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
 #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₂ x, pr1 F₃ x ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₁ x, pr1 F₂ x ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x) =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
       (pr2 F₃)
· enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
  #⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x
      #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x) =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
       (pr2 F₃)
· enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· (enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
   #⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x
       #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
      #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x)
           (pr1 F₃ x)
      · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₃ x)
          (pr1 F₄ x))) =
mon_lassociator
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃))
  (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂))
· (identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
        (pr2 F₃)
   · (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃)
        (pr2 F₄)
      · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x
    #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x)
        (pr1 F₃ x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x)) =
identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
     (pr2 F₃)
· (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃)
     (pr2 F₄)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
     (pr2 F₃)
· (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃)
     (pr2 F₄)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x
    #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x)
        (pr1 F₃ x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x))

x: C₁
identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
     (pr2 F₃)
· (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃)
     (pr2 F₄)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x) = 
?b

x: C₁
?b =
enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x
    #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x)
        (pr1 F₃ x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x))

x: C₁
identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
     (pr2 F₃)
· (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃)
     (pr2 F₄)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x) =

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₄) x = ?t2

        apply enriched_functor_hom_comp_comm.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
     (pr2 F₃)
· (enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃) x
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x)) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x
    #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x)
        (pr1 F₃ x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x))

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
     (pr2 F₃)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃) x
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x) =
enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x
    #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₃ x) (pr1 F₄ x)

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
     (pr2 F₃)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃) x =
enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x
    #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x)

PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
(identity (enriched_functor_hom (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄))
 · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₃) (pr2 F₄) x)
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)
      (pr2 F₃)
    · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃) x) =

#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x
    #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x)

#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂)

    · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₃) x) =

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V

PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V

x: C₁

#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x
    #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x
    · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x)
        (pr1 F₃ x)) =

· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)

#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₂) (pr2 F₃) x
    #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F₁) (pr2 F₂) x)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 F₃ x, pr1 F₄ x ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x) =

  #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F₁ x) (pr1 F₂ x) (pr1 F₃ x)

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ (x y : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂)
(f : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_to_arr
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  (enriched_from_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data f) = f
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
enriched_to_arr
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  (enriched_from_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data τ) = τ

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
isPredicate (mor_disp (pr2 F) (pr2 G))
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
pr1
  (enriched_to_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
     (enriched_from_arr
        enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data τ)) =
pr1 τ

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
isPredicate (mor_disp (pr2 F) (pr2 G))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: [C₁, C₂] ⟦ pr1 F, pr1 G ⟧
isaprop (pr2 F -->[ x] pr2 G)

        apply isaprop_nat_trans_enrichment.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
pr1
  (enriched_to_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
     (enriched_from_arr
        enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data τ)) =
pr1 τ

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
∏ x : C₁,
pr1
  (enriched_to_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
     (enriched_from_arr
        enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data τ))
  x = pr1 τ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

EqV: Equalizers V

F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C₁
enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr_data
  (enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)) x = pr1 τ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V

x: C₁
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x) =
pr1 τ x

x: C₁
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x) = 
?b

x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x = ?t2

        apply enriched_functor_hom_from_arr_comm.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C₁
enriched_to_arr E₂ (enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr1 τ x)) =
pr1 τ x

      apply enriched_to_from_arr.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ (x y : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂)
(f : V ⟦ I_{ V},
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y
     ⦄ ⟧),
enriched_from_arr
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  (enriched_to_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data f) = f
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V},
enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄
⟧
enriched_from_arr
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  (enriched_to_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data τ) = τ

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V},
enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄
⟧
∏ x : C₁,
enriched_from_arr
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  (enriched_to_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data τ)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x =
τ · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V},
enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄
⟧
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_from_arr
  (enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr_enrichment τ)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x =
τ · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V},
enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄
⟧
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_from_arr
  (enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr_enrichment τ)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V},
enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄
⟧
x: C₁
?b = τ · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V},
enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄
⟧
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_from_arr
  (enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr_enrichment τ)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x = ?b

        apply enriched_functor_hom_from_arr_comm.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V},
enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄
⟧
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂
  (enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr τ x) =
τ · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: V ⟦ I_{ V},
enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data ⦃ F, G ⦄
⟧
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂
  (enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr_data τ x) =
τ · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x

      apply enriched_from_to_arr.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ x : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂,
enriched_to_arr
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  (enriched_id
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data x) =
identity x
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
enriched_to_arr
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  (enriched_id
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F) =
identity F

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
isPredicate (mor_disp (pr2 F) (pr2 F))
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
pr1
  (enriched_to_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
     (enriched_id
        enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F)) =
pr1 (identity F)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
isPredicate (mor_disp (pr2 F) (pr2 F))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: [C₁, C₂] ⟦ pr1 F, pr1 F ⟧
isaprop (pr2 F -->[ x] pr2 F)

        apply isaprop_nat_trans_enrichment.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
pr1
  (enriched_to_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
     (enriched_id
        enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F)) =
pr1 (identity F)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
∏ x : C₁,
pr1
  (enriched_to_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
     (enriched_id
        enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F))
  x = pr1 (identity F) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr_data
  (enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 F)) x =
identity ((pr11 F) x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 F)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 F) x) =
identity ((pr11 F) x)

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 F)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 F) x) = 
?b

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
?b = identity ((pr11 F) x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂

enriched_to_arr E₂
  (enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 F)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 F) x) =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_id (pr2 F)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 F) x = ?t2

        apply enriched_functor_hom_id_comm.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
x: C₁
enriched_to_arr E₂ (enriched_id E₂ (pr1 F x)) =
identity ((pr11 F) x)

      apply enriched_to_arr_id.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
∏ (x y z : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂)
(f : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · g =
enriched_to_arr
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr
       enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data g
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr
          enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data f
   · enriched_comp
       enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data x y z)
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
τ · θ =
enriched_to_arr
  enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr
       enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data θ
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr
          enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data τ
   · enriched_comp
       enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F G H)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
isPredicate (mor_disp (pr2 F) (pr2 H))
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V

τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
pr1 (τ · θ) =
pr1
  (enriched_to_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
     (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
      · enriched_from_arr
          enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data θ
        #⊗ enriched_from_arr
             enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
             τ
      · enriched_comp
          enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data F
          G H))

θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
isPredicate (mor_disp (pr2 F) (pr2 H))

θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: [C₁, C₂] ⟦ pr1 F, pr1 H ⟧
isaprop (pr2 F -->[ x] pr2 H)

        apply isaprop_nat_trans_enrichment.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
pr1 (τ · θ) =
pr1
  (enriched_to_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
     (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
      · enriched_from_arr
          enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data θ
        #⊗ enriched_from_arr
             enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
             τ

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
∏ x : C₁,
pr1 (τ · θ) x =
pr1
  (enriched_to_arr
     enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
     (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
      · enriched_from_arr
          enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data θ
        #⊗ enriched_from_arr
             enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
             τ
      · enriched_comp

          G H)) x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
pr1 τ x · pr1 θ x =
enrichment_functor_hom_to_arr_data
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 θ)
     #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)
   · enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 G) (pr2 H))
  x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
pr1 τ x · pr1 θ x =
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 θ)
     #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)
   · enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 G) (pr2 H)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 H) x)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 θ)
     #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)
   · enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 G) (pr2 H)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 H) x) =
pr1 τ x · pr1 θ x

enriched_to_arr E₂

   · enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 G) (pr2 H)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 H) x) = 
?b

EqV: Equalizers V

      · (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 G)
           (pr2 H)
         · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 H) x))) =

τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧

x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 θ)
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)
   · (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 G)
        (pr2 H)
      · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 H) x)) =
?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 θ)
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)
   · (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 G)
        (pr2 H)
      · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 H) x)) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
?b = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 θ)
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)
   · (enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 G)
        (pr2 H)
      · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 H) x)) =
?b

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_comp (pr2 F) (pr2 G) (pr2 H)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 H) x = ?t20

          apply enriched_functor_hom_comp_comm.
        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 θ)
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)
   · (enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 G) (pr2 H) x
      #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
      · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 H x))) =
?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 θ)
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 G) (pr2 H) x
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 H x) = 
?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 θ)
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 G) (pr2 H) x
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 θ)
   #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)
   · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 G) (pr2 H) x
     #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x) =
?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 θ)
#⊗ enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)
· enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 G) (pr2 H) x
  #⊗ enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
(enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 θ)
 · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 G) (pr2 H) x)
#⊗ (enriched_functor_hom_from_arr (pr2 τ)
    · enriched_functor_hom_pr (pr2 F) (pr2 G) x) = 
?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr1 θ x)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr1 τ x) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr1 θ x)
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr1 τ x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 H x)) =
pr1 τ x · pr1 θ x

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
EqV: Equalizers V
PV: Products C₁ V
PV': Products (C₁ × C₁) V
F, G, H: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ F, G ⟧
θ: enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂ ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C₁
pr1 τ x · pr1 θ x =
enriched_to_arr E₂
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr1 θ x)
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ (pr1 τ x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 G x) (pr1 H x))

      apply enriched_to_arr_comp.
  Qed.

  Definition enriched_functor_category_enrichment
    : enrichment (enriched_functor_category E₁ E₂) V
    := enriched_functor_category_enrichment_data
       ,,
       enriched_functor_category_enrichment_laws.
End EnrichedFunctorCategory.

(**
 5. Enrichment for enriched presheaf categories
 *)
Definition enriched_presheaf_enrichment
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C : category}
           (E : enrichment C V)
           (EqV : Equalizers V)
           (PV : Products C V)
           (PV' : Products (C × C) V)
  : enrichment
      (enriched_functor_category
         (op_enrichment V E)
         (self_enrichment V))
      V
  := enriched_functor_category_enrichment
       (op_enrichment V E)
       (self_enrichment V)
       EqV
       PV
       PV'.
